zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz於1292年11月1日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托金頓時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet14歲，母親Elizabeth Zouche17歲。他和Elizabeth Paveley至少有1個兒子。他去世於1337年3月25日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz于1292年11月1日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托金頓时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet14岁，母亲Elizabeth Zouche17岁。他和Elizabeth Paveley至少有1个儿子。他去世于1337年3月25日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz was born on 1 November 1292, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, was 14 and his mother, Elizabeth Zouche, was 17. He had at least 1 son with Elizabeth Paveley. He died on 25 March 1337, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz est né le 1 novembre 1292, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Zouche, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Elizabeth Paveley. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1337, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz am 1. November 1292 in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet 14 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Zouche 17. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Paveley mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 25. März 1337 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz è nato il il 1 novembre 1292 nel Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Zouche, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Elizabeth Paveley. Morì il 25 marzo 1337, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntzが1292年11月1日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Malletは14歳，母Elizabeth Zoucheは17歳であった。彼はElizabeth Paveleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1337年3月25日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz(이)가 1292년 11월 1일 영국 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Zouche(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Paveley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1337년 3월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 November 1292–25 March 1337: 1 de novembro de 1292–25 de março de 1337
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1292, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Zouche, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Elizabeth Paveley. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1337, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz родился 1 ноября 1292 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Zouche, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Elizabeth Paveley. Он умер 25 марта 1337 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.1 November 1292–25 March 1337: 1 de noviembre de 1292–25 de marzo de 1337
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz nació el 1 de noviembre de 1292, en Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Zouche, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Elizabeth Paveley. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1337, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
